name: custom-file-upload-pro
description: Shopify app for customer file uploads — production-ready SaaS

scripts.build: echo "Run from backend/ or frontend/ directory"
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm ci && npx nest build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.migration:run: cd backend && npx typeorm migration:run -d src/common/config/database.config.ts
scripts.migration:revert: cd backend && npx typeorm migration:revert -d src/common/config/database.config.ts
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
